title: isachne pilulifera
intro: Isachne pilulifera, also known as button grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Isachne pilulifera include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Isachne pilulifera is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, and is typically harvested and dried for later use.
